#
 #This file was generated by Claude Code.
 #Claude Generated: CMake build configuration for QML test application.
 #

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

# Project name and language
project(QmlTestApp LANGUAGES CXX)

# Find required Qt5 components (Qt Quick and Qt Core)
find_package(Qt5 COMPONENTS Quick Core REQUIRED)

# Source files
set(SRC
    main.cpp
)

# Resource file (contains QML, JS, JSON)
set(RESOURCES
    qml.qrc
)

# Create executable
add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME} ${SRC} ${RESOURCES})

# Link Qt libraries
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE Qt5::Quick Qt5::Core)

# Enforce C++14 (Qt 5.12+ supports C++11 automatically)
target_compile_features(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE cxx_std_14)

# Enable automatic processing of MOC, RCC, and UIC (UIs not used but harmless)
set_target_properties(${PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES
    AUTOMOC ON
    AUTORCC ON
    AUTOUIC ON
)

# Installation (optional)
install(TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME} RUNTIME DESTINATION bin)
